items.briefing:
A recent article raises concerns about the Canva cyber breach and its implications for Australian schools, highlighting how data from educational platforms can affect students and staff. This is a timely reminder for training organisations to review what third-party platforms hold your data and ensure staff and students are aware of any breach notifications. Separately, KnowBe4 has launched a free cyber safety hub called CAPY aimed at helping Australian families stay safe online — a useful resource to share with staff.

**Practical tip:** Check whether your organisation uses Canva or similar platforms and remind staff to update their passwords and enable multi-factor authentication on those accounts today.
